title: The Inspector General
writer: Nikolay Gogol, Prof. Mathesius, Václav Menger
actors: Vlasta Burian, Jaroslav Marvan, Václav Trégl
plot: Vlasta Burian appears in a town of Czarist Russia impersonating an Inspector General, and he is entertained lavishly by the local political-hacks and peasants seeking his favor for whatever they are advocating or need fixed. Burai...
